fallback_messages: The playable state is back and notably starts cleaner than Week 5 did: `₡464 / Hunger 20 / Sanity 20 / Sore Legs 54h / 24CH`. The standard snapshot doesn’t expose the city cards here, so I’m switching to the known compact DOM probe to identify the current location surface and then I’ll run the Week 6 route.
retry_messages:
Completed one authoritative Week 6 slice for Persona A. Safe Grinder resumed from the Week 5 summary at `₡464 / Hunger 20% / Sanity 20 / Sore Legs 54h`, hit `BROKEN AUTO-CHEF`, took the safe `₡20` protein-bar branch, restored `Work Shift x3`, and closed Week 6 at `₡616 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 20% / Sanity 15 / Sore Legs 6h`. The key finding is that the earlier two-shift cap was duration-bound: once `Sore Legs` dropped to `54h`, travel fell to `3CH` and the full labor route reopened.

Updated the canonical slice record at [week-06.md](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/phase-11-slices/persona-a/week-06.md), rolled the synthesis forward in [audit-log-persona-a.md](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/audit-log-persona-a.md), [phase-11-audit-progress.md](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/phase-11-audit-progress.md), and [current-phase.md](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyb...
